BUY PRESALE
ABOUT

What is it?

At its fluffy heart, Koalacoin is a crypto movement that makes people smile! We will be creating a play to earn game where users can earn money for completing specific tasks while interacting and enjoying playing against users worldwide.

LEARN MORE
KoalaKash Coin
STEP BY STEP

How it works?

01 Choose your wallet

A wallet is necessary for people wanting to use, trade, or hold KoalaKash. You can pick a wallet.

02 Log into our presale

After picking your wallet, you can choose from a number of payment methods to purchase Koala with.

03 Get some KoalaKash

Tadaa, after payment you will see your KoalaKash within your account.

WHY KOALA?

Koala Kash Benefits

Affordable Cryptocurrency

It is a fun, and affordable way to learn about crypto world for entry-level buyers and a nice diversion for more advanced users.

The Fluffiest Community

Buying our tokens will grant you an access to our community where you can learn, share and network with other #KoalaLovers.

Reward Programs

For most active community members and token owners we provide attractive rewards and distinctions

Token Utlities

Early Platform Access

Become the first to be onboarded to any new platforms that Koala create along the way

Decentralized Governance

The community will vote on new ideas and shape the future of Koala Coin

Rewards Programme

Earn rewards for completing tasks, proposing ideas and taking part in the Koala world

VIP Holders

Earn higher staking rewards, account managers and first voting rights on everything Koala

Send token price into koala land

Reward giveaway

When will I receive my KLC tokens?

Will team tokens and liquidity be locked?

Team tokens will be locked for 550 days and liquidity locked for life to ensure investor safety.
